known_limits: native_cpp parity compares Python-compatible state signatures
ocean_c parity allows fp32-vs-fp64 tolerance for combat float fields
ocean_c parity compares no-reset trace rows, not Puffer's auto-reset worker loop
fuzz parity is differential testing over generated traces, not exhaustive proof
parity does not prove policy quality or MuZero learning quality

scenarios.description: reset, observation, and legal-mask parity
scenarios.name: reset_only

scenarios.description: hold and greed end-round transitions
scenarios.name: economy_rounds

scenarios.description: shop refresh, buying, upgrade targeting, and board fielding
scenarios.name: roll_buy_field

scenarios.description: XP buys, illegal affordability checks, and round advancement
scenarios.name: level_tempo

scenarios.description: out-of-range and currently illegal legal-mask behavior
scenarios.name: illegal_actions

scenarios.description: terminal death under the tuned hard enemy-pressure curve
scenarios.name: terminal_pressure
